title: Houthi plans for a US-Iran war worry a weary Yemen
description: During talks between the US and Iran, the Houthis continued to voice support for their backers in Tehran. In the event of war, Houthi leaders recently threatened to renew attacks on commerical shipping.

title: Little Rock Hall locks down Dettmering, uses huge run to beat Fountain Lake
description: HEBER SPRINGS -- When his team beat Fountain Lake 57-52 back on Feb. 10, Little Rock Hall Coach Jon Coleman lamented the fact that he didn't use one of his lengthier players, particularly Landen Hill, to try to slow down Dillon Dettmering.

title: Lekki tollgate: Lai Mohammed lied over massacre, Lagos govt paid N100m to survivors – Dele Farotimi
description: Activist lawyer, Dele Farotimi, has accused former Minister of Information, Lai Mohammed of lying in his account of the incident at Lekki tollgate. Mohammed recently claimed that nobody was killed at the Lekki tollgate in the year 2020. However, in an interview on the State Affairs podcast with Edmund Obilo, the activist lawyer insisted that [...]Lekki tollgate: Lai Mohammed lied over massacre, Lagos govt paid N100m to survivors – Dele Farotimi

title: Ch Shujaat salutes armed forces for their successful action against TTP
description: F.P. Report LAHORE: Former prime minister and Pakistan Muslim League-Quaid (PML-Q) President Chaudhry Shujaat Hussain said on Saturday that the befitting reply given by Pakistan’s armed forces to the TTP had once again made the nation feel proud. He was speaking to Senator Sardar Ahmad Khan Laghari and MPA Sardar Mansoor Laghari, who called on [...]
